source_files: public/locales/<lang>/loc_guide.json for lang in de, en, fr
_meta.description: Data guide page explaining the dataset and portal, with example queries.
_meta.format: Each entry: context (where the string appears in the UI, its role, placeholders and length/grammar constraints) + the current de/en/fr texts as translation reference. Use the context when translating into a new language; a null text means the key is missing in that language file.
_meta.generated: 2026-07-13, code-verified against app/ sources; regenerate when public/locales texts or consuming components change.

guide.title.context: Data guide page (/project/data-guide, app/routes/pages/project/data_guide/data_guide.tsx): the page's main heading (h1). Short noun phrase; the page is a field guide to the eleven data categories of the portal.

guide.lead.context: Data guide page (/project/data-guide, app/routes/pages/project/data_guide/data_guide.tsx): lead/intro paragraph directly under the h1. Prose sentence; 'Eleven' must match the number of data-type cards on the page; keep the aside natural in the target language.
guide.lead.en: Eleven kinds of data from the parliaments of Switzerland and Liechtenstein. Each has its own search page and a few examples.
guide.lead.de: Elf Datenarten aus den Parlamenten der Schweiz und Liechtensteins. Jede mit eigener Suchseite und ein paar Beispielen.
guide.lead.fr: Onze types de données des parlements de Suisse et du Liechtenstein. Chacun a sa page de recherche et quelques exemples.

guide.map_link.context: Data guide page (/project/data-guide, app/routes/pages/project/data_guide/data_guide.tsx): text of the single footer link pointing to the data-map page that diagrams how the entity types relate. Short link label, sentence case.

guide.groups.actors.heading.context: Data guide page (/project/data-guide, app/routes/pages/project/data_guide/data_guide.tsx): section heading (h2) for the 'Actors' cluster of cards — Actors (People, Parliaments, Committees & groups). One short noun; must stay brief.

guide.groups.actors.sub.context: Data guide page (/project/data-guide, app/routes/pages/project/data_guide/data_guide.tsx): small muted subtitle shown right-aligned next to the 'actors' group heading. Very short tagline describing the cluster; no terminal period.

guide.types.people.eyebrow.context: Data guide page (/project/data-guide, app/routes/pages/project/data_guide/data_guide.tsx): uppercase eyebrow label at the top of the People (MPs) card — names the data category. Single short noun (plural), rendered in small caps-style uppercase.

guide.types.people.title.context: Data guide page (/project/data-guide, app/routes/pages/project/data_guide/data_guide.tsx): headline (h3) of the People (MPs) card — a rhetorical teaser question inviting exploration.
guide.types.people.title.en: Who votes like whom, and who talks about what?
guide.types.people.title.de: Wer stimmt wie wer, und wer redet worüber?
guide.types.people.title.fr: Qui vote comme qui, et qui parle de quoi ?

guide.types.people.links.alignment.context: Data guide page (/project/data-guide, app/routes/pages/project/data_guide/data_guide.tsx): link label on the People (MPs) card. Bulleted example link to a person's voting-alignment page (who votes most similarly); {{name}} is replaced with the person's name.

Card-footer link to the people search page. '26,000' is the approximate member count; German uses Swiss thousands separator (26'000).

guide.types.bodies.eyebrow.context: Data guide page (/project/data-guide, app/routes/pages/project/data_guide/data_guide.tsx): uppercase eyebrow label at the top of the Parliaments (councils/bodies) card — names the data category. Single short noun (plural), rendered in small caps-style uppercase.

guide.types.bodies.title.context: Data guide page (/project/data-guide, app/routes/pages/project/data_guide/data_guide.tsx): headline (h3) of the Parliaments (councils/bodies) card — a rhetorical teaser question inviting exploration. 'Bloc' = voting as a unified block; 'defects' = breaking ranks with one's party.
guide.types.bodies.title.en: Which party votes as one bloc, and who breaks away?
guide.types.bodies.title.de: Welche Partei stimmt als Block, und wer schert aus?
guide.types.bodies.title.fr: Quel parti vote comme un seul bloc, et qui fait défection ?

guide.types.bodies.links.loyalty.context: Data guide page (/project/data-guide, app/routes/pages/project/data_guide/data_guide.tsx): link label on the Parliaments (councils/bodies) card. Bulleted example link to the party-loyalty chart of the Swiss Federal Assembly. 'Fraktionstreue' = loyalty to one's parliamentary group (Fraktion); 'Federal Assembly' is the Swiss national parliament (Bundesversammlung/Assemblée fédérale) — use its official name.
guide.types.bodies.links.loyalty.en: Party loyalty in the Federal Assembly
guide.types.bodies.links.loyalty.fr: La loyauté de groupe à l'Assemblée fédérale

guide.types.bodies.links.lobby.context: Data guide page (/project/data-guide, app/routes/pages/project/data_guide/data_guide.tsx): link label on the Parliaments (councils/bodies) card. Bulleted example link to the lobby-network graph of the Federal Assembly. 'Federal' here = Swiss national level (eidgenössisch).

guide.types.bodies.links.people.context: Data guide page (/project/data-guide, app/routes/pages/project/data_guide/data_guide.tsx): link label on the Parliaments (councils/bodies) card. Bulleted example link to the member list of the Federal Assembly.
guide.types.bodies.links.people.en: All members of the Federal Assembly
guide.types.bodies.links.people.fr: Tous les membres de l'Assemblée fédérale

guide.types.bodies.links.search.context: Data guide page (/project/data-guide, app/routes/pages/project/data_guide/data_guide.tsx): link label on the Parliaments (councils/bodies) card. Card-footer link to the bodies (parliaments) search page. Conveys the range from national chambers down to ~460 municipal parliaments; 'communes' = municipalities (Gemeinden).

guide.types.bodies.links.search.de: Von den eidgenössischen Räten bis zu rund 460 Gemeinden

guide.types.speeches.queries.wolf.context: Data guide page (/project/data-guide, app/routes/pages/project/data_guide/data_guide.tsx): not a visible label — the localized search term appended as ?q= to the Speeches (plenary interventions) card's 'wolf' link URL. Should be the word for the animal 'wolf' in the target language, capitalized as a natural search input; it must actually match speech texts in de/fr/it, so keep it a plain dictionary word.

metas.data_guide.title.context: SEO copy (NOT UI chrome): read in route meta() via metas/loc.ts from the 'loc_guide' namespace 'metas' block; the interface language selects which file. data_guide page SEO <title>.

metas.data_guide.desc.context: SEO copy (NOT UI chrome): read in route meta() via metas/loc.ts from the 'loc_guide' namespace 'metas' block; the interface language selects which file. data_guide page meta-description.
metas.data_guide.desc.en: Eleven kinds of data from the parliaments of Switzerland and Liechtenstein: people, parliaments, affairs, votings, speeches, documents and lobbying ties. Each has its own search page and concrete examples.
metas.data_guide.desc.de: Elf Datenarten aus den Parlamenten der Schweiz und Liechtensteins: Personen, Parlamente, Geschäfte, Abstimmungen, Reden, Dokumente und Lobby-Verbindungen. Jede mit eigener Suchseite und konkreten Beispielen.
metas.data_guide.desc.fr: Onze types de données des parlements de Suisse et du Liechtenstein : personnes, parlements, affaires, votes, discours, documents et liens de lobbying. Chacun a sa page de recherche et des exemples concrets.
metas.data_guide.desc.it: Undici tipi di dati dai parlamenti di Svizzera e Liechtenstein — persone, parlamenti, affari, votazioni, discorsi, documenti, legami di lobbying — ciascuno con la propria pagina di ricerca ed esempi concreti.
metas.data_guide.desc.es: Once tipos de datos de los parlamentos de Suiza y Liechtenstein — personas, parlamentos, asuntos, votaciones, discursos, documentos, vínculos de lobbying — cada uno con su propia página de búsqueda y ejemplos concretos.
